data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6 (final): Test function test_setup_references_root_install_doc appended to tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh and registered in runner. RED marker added to .test-index. Verified RED state: 'FAIL: test_setup_references_root_install_doc: old \'docs/INSTALL.md\' absent' — exactly the expected behavior because dso-setup.sh line 491 still prints 'See docs/INSTALL.md for full documentation'. After fix, output will reference root 'INSTALL.md' and test will pass.
